---
title: 'Controle Digital: Transformada Z'
subtitle: "Sistema de Controle II"
institute: "Universidade Federal do Pará"
author: "Prof. Dr. Raphael Teixeira"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../TemaRTx.scss] 
    self-contained: true
    transition: slide
    slide-number: true
    width: 1600 
    height: 900
    footer: " "
    center: true
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: "../Notas/imgs/UFPA.png"
      data-background-size: "100px"
      data-background-position: "top 40px center"
engine: knitr
---

## Controle de Sistemas Amostrados

![](imgs/Amostrador.png){fig-align="center" width="30%"}


---

## Introdução
